member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.CoreAssembly
member.summary: Identifies the Autodesk-free core assembly for retaining wall table, parameter, and geometry logic.

member.name: F:RetainingWall.Core.CoreAssembly.AssemblyName
member.summary: Gets the expected assembly name for the pure core project.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.GeometryLink
member.summary: Represents a generated link between two points for the retaining wall geometry.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.GeometryPoint
member.summary: Represents a generated 2D point for the retaining wall geometry.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.GeometryResult
member.summary: Represents the complete generated geometry for the retaining wall.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.GeometryShape
member.summary: Represents a generated closed shape for the retaining wall geometry.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.Side
member.summary: Specifies the side of the road on which the retaining wall is constructed.

member.name: F:RetainingWall.Core.Side.Left
member.summary: Left side.

member.name: F:RetainingWall.Core.Side.Right
member.summary: Right side.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.WallCaseTable
member.summary: Provides access to the standard retaining wall case table.

member.name: M:RetainingWall.Core.WallCaseTable.GetDimensions(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the standard dimensions for the specified wall case. Dimensions are converted from mm to metres internally.
member.returns: A instance containing the dimensions in metres.
member.exception: Thrown when the wall case is not between 2 and 12.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides
member.summary: Represents overrides for standard retaining wall dimensions.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides.UseDimensionOverrides
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether dimension overrides should be used.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides.OverrideA
member.summary: Override for Dimension A in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides.OverrideB
member.summary: Override for Dimension B in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides.OverrideC
member.summary: Override for Dimension C in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides.OverrideD
member.summary: Override for Dimension D in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides.OverrideE
member.summary: Override for Dimension E in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides.OverrideF
member.summary: Override for Dimension F in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides.OverrideG
member.summary: Override for Dimension G in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides.OverrideH1
member.summary: Override for Dimension H1 in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides.OverrideH2
member.summary: Override for Dimension H2 in metres.

member.name: M:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensionOverrides.Apply(RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions)
member.summary: Applies the overrides to the specified base dimensions. If is false, the base dimensions are returned. If an override value is greater than zero, it replaces the base dimension.
member.param: The standard dimensions from the wall case table.
member.returns: A new instance with overrides applied.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions
member.summary: Represents the standard dimensions for a retaining wall case. All values are stored internally in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.A
member.summary: Dimension A in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.B
member.summary: Dimension B in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.C
member.summary: Dimension C in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.D
member.summary: Dimension D in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.E
member.summary: Dimension E in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.F
member.summary: Dimension F in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.G
member.summary: Dimension G in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.H1
member.summary: Dimension H1 in metres.

member.name: P:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.H2
member.summary: Dimension H2 in metres.

member.name: M:RetainingWall.Core.WallDimensions.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with values in metres.

member.name: T:RetainingWall.Core.WallGeometryGenerator
member.summary: Generates retaining wall geometry based on parameters.
